arcs.title: The Glowing Briefcase
arcs.summary: The briefcase has migrated overnight from Level Three to Level Two without explanation, and its glow has shifted from amber to gold. A clerk named Whitmore attempted to open it and found himself peacefully emptied of intention — no distress, just a complete inability to recall what he wanted. The Ministry has upgraded its statement while still naming nothing and nobody. Day 3 should reveal something about the briefcase's origin or contents — perhaps a label, a sound, or someone who recognises it from somewhere they can't quite place.

arcs.title: The Duck Bandit
arcs.summary: A new arc formalised from ongoing texture: the Duck Bandit placed a rubber duck on the Jeep at Heron Shelf, forty miles east of Jellico, accessible only by a difficult track. This represents the Bandit's most remote confirmed placement. The investigation has been upgraded to a Regional Incident. Day 2 should explore how the duck got there — a witness, a second vehicle, a trail sighting, or a clue on the duck itself.
